description: Deterministic no-model chain unit for apitests: a single noop task whose print template is the entire reply. It resolves no model, so a fleet unit dispatched from it needs no backend and no network — which is what lets test_fleet.py exercise a real dispatch -> running -> stop lifecycle hermetically. Seeded into the serve workspace's .contenox/ before boot by scripts/run_apitests.sh so chain-agent discovery (which runs once at `contenox serve` startup) declares it as a fleet-dispatchable agent named 'agent-apitest-noop'.

tasks.description: Answer every prompt with the fixed fixture text.
